name: Roadmap Burn Down Wave 3 - Public Beta Wedge
outcome_goal: Build the smallest public-beta wedge around lifecycle, service startup, setup, and operator boundaries.

jobs.label: workflow_lifecycle_projection
jobs.prompt: Collapse workflow terminal lifecycle state, receipts, leases, and status projection toward one queryable lifecycle authority. Start from BUG-0DEF0D0A and BUG-98228556 if present. Do not build a monitor around broken state. Make a bounded change with tests that prove one source owns the transition being fixed.

jobs.label: service_lifecycle_target_authority
jobs.prompt: Promote service lifecycle behavior toward runtime-target-neutral authority and keep shell/docker scripts as adapters. Focus on one high-value split-brain path where setup or health claims success from the wrong authority. Add focused tests or an operator-view proof.

jobs.label: setup_onboarding_frontdoor
jobs.prompt: Make zero-to-operational setup more deterministic without making docs the authority. If public setup instructions and runtime profiles disagree, fix the runtime/profile source and leave docs as projections. Include a validation path for fresh-clone or first-run behavior.

jobs.label: operator_surface_boundary
jobs.prompt: Reduce operator surface authority ambiguity without a broad rewrite. Pick one direct surface-owned behavior that should be a gateway operation or repository boundary, move it to the clearer authority, and add tests. Avoid cosmetic decomposition; the change must reduce hidden state or duplicated authority.
